settings.heading: Big Trophy Price in India (Tall & Statement)
settings.subheading: How much do big, tall trophies cost in India? Pricing for large presentation cups and statement trophies — including very tall metal-and-fibre builds for the photo moment. By Meru Trophy.
settings.price_caption: Indicative starting prices in India. Final price depends on size, material and engraving. Bulk discounts apply. GST invoice available.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: Big trophies in India — tall presentation cups and statement pieces — typically run ₹2,000 to ₹15,000+, depending on height, material and detailing. Very tall builds use metal-and-fibre to maximise impact affordably. Meru Trophy quotes exactly on WhatsApp (+91 78922 07252).

settings.heading: What you'll pay and why
settings.text: Big trophies make the photo. Large presentation cups start around ₹2,000; impressive multi-tier and very tall trophies (several feet) run higher, using metal-and-fibre construction to get height and presence without an extreme price. Detailing, plating and engraved bases add to the cost. Tell us the height and budget you want and we'll hit it.

settings.question: How much is a big/tall trophy?
settings.answer: Large cups from around ₹2,000; very tall statement trophies ₹10,000–₹15,000+, depending on height and material.

settings.question: How do you make them tall affordably?
settings.answer: Metal-and-fibre construction gives height and presence at a sensible price versus solid metal.

settings.question: Can it be a perpetual/rolling trophy?
settings.answer: Yes — large perpetual cups with space for multiple years of winners.

settings.question: Can you brand and engrave it?
settings.answer: Yes — event name, sponsor and winners engraved on the cup or base.

settings.heading: Want an exact price?
settings.text: Send your item, quantity and engraving — we'll send a precise quote, usually within the hour.
